Off Calendar May-15-2006 Assigned To Trial Court
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
PIETRO RICCIO, CIELO RICCIO & MICHAEL RULLODA, plaintiffs in pro per
JENNIFER BECKER, Esq. on behalf of defendant Irving Pfeffer

The Court held an in camera hearing regarding the applications for waiver of court fees and costs, and waiver of additional court fees of jury fee and per diem fees. Having examined each plaintiff, the Court granted waiver of all fees requested. Order signed in open court. This case to proceed as a jury trial.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerk: V.Mu; Reporter: Rita Howell, CSR #2542 (206)
